questions.q: This term describes the path data takes across networks.
This value determines the preferred path in routing.
This administrative value determines route trustworthiness.
This feature allows multiple routing protocols to share routes.
This process summarizes multiple routes into one.
This device connects networks together.
This device operates at Layer 2 of the OSI model.
This model describes how networks communicate in seven layers.
This layer handles encryption and compression.
This layer manages sessions between applications.
This software protects devices from malicious programs.
This attack tricks users into revealing sensitive information.
This policy enforces strong password requirements.
This technique encrypts data to protect confidentiality.
This principle grants users only the access they need.
This exam validates foundational networking knowledge.
This command displays interface configuration details.
This address uniquely identifies a device on a network.
This protocol provides connectionless communication.
This addressing method allows multiple devices to share one public IP.
